title: chrysosplenium nepalense
intro: Chrysosplenium nepalense, also known as Nepal golden saxifrage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium nepalense are said to include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Chrysosplenium nepalense can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in hot water, or dried and made into capsules for consumption.
